description: A customer needs to cancel their non-refundable flight booking.

nodes.task_description: Explain the cancellation policy for their non-refundable ticket, including any cancellation fees and the value that will be converted to a future travel credit.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly explains the financial outcome of cancelling.

nodes.task_description: Cancel the booking and issue a travel credit voucher to the customer for the remaining value.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent cancels the flight segments and issues the voucher.
